title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIT Warangal International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIT Warangal International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NIT Warangal International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Warangal International Enterprises:
NIT Warangal International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal International Enterprises!
